description_long: This is a round, wide-mouthed ceramic vase with a slightly flared rim and a bulbous body that tapers gently toward the base. The surface displays a mix of smooth and rough textures, with visible discoloration and patches indicating age or partial restoration. Several cracks and repairs are evident, especially on one side, suggesting it has been pieced together from fragments. The coloration ranges from light gray to dark brown, with some areas appearing more weathered or stained. The interior is dark and appears hollow, suitable for holding contents. The overall form is utilitarian yet has a rustic, historical character, making it suitable for display in public or outdoor urban settings.
description: A round, wide-mouthed ceramic vase with a flared rim, visible cracks, and a weathered, patchy surface in gray and brown tones.
description_view_0: This view highlights the smoother, lighter side of the vase with a prominent dark, rough patch and visible repair lines.
description_view_1: The front shows the most weathered and cracked surface, with multiple visible fractures and a darker, mottled appearance.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a blend of smooth and rough textures, with discoloration and a large repaired section on the body.
description_view_3: The back displays the most uniform, lighter surface with minimal visible cracks and a subtle matte finish.
